exp.desc:
_Internship At Kanakdristi_ 
 Worked across frontend and backend on client-facing and internal platforms. Built responsive UIs with Next.js, Nuxt.js, Tailwind CSS, and GSAP, and developed backend features and API integrations using Express.js and NestJS. Contributed to a travel CRM using React (Vite), Zustand, React Query, and MUI.

_SDE Trainee at ETH Infra_ 
 Built and delivered a Flutter-based mobile application for an employee management system, improving internal workflow accessibility by providing a unified mobile interface for employees and management. 
 
 Architected the foundational backend system structure (modules, API contracts, and service boundaries) that enabled backend development to scale in a structured manner and reduced implementation friction for the backend team. 
 
 Maintained platform reliability and deployment infrastructure by managing hosting, database operations, and uptime monitoring, ensuring stable production releases and continuous system availability.
